title.zh: 我刚进入一个新领域，需要快速建立判断力
title.en: I am entering a new field and need a first map

description.zh: 从宽泛主题出发，建立关键词、代表论文、核心作者、引用网络和后续追踪清单。
description.en: Start from a broad topic and build keywords, representative papers, core authors, citation maps, and tracking lists.

inputMaterials: 导师或项目给出的关键词

workflow.step: 建立第一批可靠文献池

prompt.zh: /lit-search 围绕“我的研究主题”检索近五年和高被引核心论文，按理论、方法、应用场景分组，并标注开放获取链接。
prompt.en: /lit-search Search recent and highly cited core papers around my topic, group them by theory, method, and application, and mark open-access links.

prompt.zh: /citation-network 使用这些种子论文识别经典论文、核心作者、机构群和新兴分支，输出一张可解释的领域地图。
prompt.en: /citation-network Use these seed papers to identify classics, core authors, institutions, and emerging branches, then output an interpretable field map.

prompt.zh: /paper-tracker 追踪这个领域未来 30 天的新论文，范围包括这些关键词、作者、机构和目标期刊，输出 Markdown 周报模板。
prompt.en: /paper-tracker Track new papers in this field for the next 30 days across these keywords, authors, institutions, and venues, and output a Markdown digest template.

title.zh: 我有兴趣方向，但还没有可投稿的问题
title.en: I have an interest area but no publishable question

description.zh: 把模糊兴趣收束为研究问题、理论贡献、边界条件、可执行设计和风险清单。
description.en: Turn a fuzzy interest into a research question, theoretical contribution, boundaries, executable design, and risk list.

prompt.zh: /topic-framing 基于这些材料，生成 5 个可研究论文问题；每个问题说明核心变量、机制、边界、可用数据和可能标题。
prompt.en: /topic-framing Generate five researchable paper questions from these notes; for each, state variables, mechanism, boundary, available data, and possible title.

prompt.zh: /research-gap 检查这些候选问题是否对应真实文献缺口，区分时间缺口、方法缺口、理论缺口和应用缺口，并按贡献潜力排序。
prompt.en: /research-gap Check whether these candidate questions map to real gaps; separate temporal, methodological, theoretical, and application gaps, then rank contribution potential.

prompt.zh: /lit-search 针对排名最高的 2 个问题，补齐必须阅读的经典论文和近三年论文，并说明每篇论文对选题判断的作用。
prompt.en: /lit-search For the top two questions, complete the must-read classic and recent papers, and explain how each informs topic choice.

title.zh: 我要把一批文献整理成可写的证据结构
title.en: I need to turn papers into a writable evidence structure

description.zh: 把论文列表、BibTeX、阅读笔记和 PDF 转成主题结构、争议矩阵、证据强度和综述骨架。
description.en: Turn paper lists, BibTeX, notes, and PDFs into themes, debate matrices, evidence strength, and review structure.

prompt.zh: /literature-review 基于这批论文，按研究问题、方法、样本、主要发现、限制和证据强度生成证据矩阵。
prompt.en: /literature-review Build an evidence matrix from these papers by question, method, sample, main finding, limitation, and evidence strength.

workflow.step: 从长 PDF 和附录抽取细节

prompt.zh: /pdf-explore 扫描这些 PDF，抽取所有数据集、样本量、模型设定、评价指标和附录中的关键表格。
prompt.en: /pdf-explore Scan these PDFs and extract all datasets, sample sizes, model settings, evaluation metrics, and key appendix tables.

workflow.step: 将证据变成图表和综述骨架

prompt.zh: /scientific-visualization 根据证据矩阵生成适合综述的趋势图、研究设计分布图和证据强度图，并输出可投稿格式。
prompt.en: /scientific-visualization Create review-ready trend, study-design distribution, and evidence-strength figures from the matrix, using submission-ready formats.

title.zh: 我有很多 PDF，不想再手工翻附录和图表
title.en: I have many PDFs and need the details without manual hunting

description.zh: 面向长论文、技术报告、政策文件和补充材料，跨页抽取方法、数据、图表、指标和引用证据。
description.en: Extract methods, data, figures, metrics, and citation evidence across long papers, reports, policies, and supplements.

targetUsers: 需要精读 PDF 的研究者
inputMaterials: 论文草稿中的待核验论断

prompt.zh: /pdf-explore 对这组 PDF 建立页码索引，定位所有提到数据集、实验设置、稳健性检验和局限性的页面。
prompt.en: /pdf-explore Build a page index for these PDFs and locate every page mentioning datasets, experimental settings, robustness checks, and limitations.

prompt.zh: /literature-review 将这些 PDF 摘录整理成可写入文献综述的方法比较、结果比较和局限比较。
prompt.en: /literature-review Turn these PDF excerpts into writable comparisons of methods, results, and limitations.

workflow.step: 核验草稿里的引用支撑

prompt.zh: /cite-verify 根据 PDF 原文核验 draft.md 中每个关键论断是否被对应引用真实支撑。
prompt.en: /cite-verify Verify against the PDF sources whether each key claim in draft.md is genuinely supported by its citation.

title.zh: 我正在打磨论文草稿，想进入可评审状态
title.en: I am polishing a manuscript into review-ready shape

description.zh: 集中处理摘要、论证主线、图组叙事、审稿风险和引用支撑，让草稿更像一篇可以投稿的论文。
description.en: Tighten the abstract, argument, figure story, review risks, and citation support so the draft becomes submission-ready.

prompt.zh: /abstract 请基于 draft.md 生成结构化摘要、短摘要和投稿版摘要，突出问题、方法、发现、贡献和目标读者。
prompt.en: /abstract Generate structured, short, and submission abstracts from draft.md, highlighting question, method, findings, contribution, and target readers.

prompt.zh: /paper-narrative 基于论文草稿、摘要和图注，判断 Fig 1 是否有送审钩子，重排图组证据弧线，并列出缺失分析。
prompt.en: /paper-narrative Use the manuscript, abstract, and captions to judge whether Fig 1 has a review hook, reshape the evidence arc, and list missing analyses.

prompt.zh: /peer-review draft.md 请按 8 项审稿标准模拟审稿，列出最可能导致拒稿的问题，并给出引用核验优先级。
prompt.en: /peer-review draft.md Simulate peer review across eight criteria, list the issues most likely to cause rejection, and prioritize citation verification.

title.zh: 我要把数据和图组做成期刊级表达
title.en: I need journal-ready figures and figure narratives

description.zh: 从单张统计图到多面板复合图，处理图形选择、可读性、配色、标注、导出格式和图组叙事。
description.en: Move from single plots to multi-panel figures with chart choice, legibility, color, labels, export formats, and figure narrative.

workflow.step: 确定每张图回答的问题

prompt.zh: /paper-narrative 基于摘要、结果部分和现有图注，判断每张图在论文证据链中的角色，并建议 Fig 1、主图和补充图分配。
prompt.en: /paper-narrative Based on the abstract, results, and captions, judge each figure's role in the evidence chain and suggest Fig 1, main-figure, and supplement allocation.

prompt.zh: /scientific-visualization 根据这些数据生成期刊级图表，要求色盲友好、灰度可读、带误差线和显著性标注，并导出 PDF/TIFF。
prompt.en: /scientific-visualization Generate journal-ready figures from these data with colorblind-safe palettes, grayscale readability, error bars, significance labels, and PDF/TIFF export.

workflow.step: 组合多面板并做视觉质检

prompt.zh: /figure-composer 基于这个核心论断和数据文件，设计 12 栏网格多面板图，逐面板渲染、拼接、标号，并做不超过 3 轮自检修订。
prompt.en: /figure-composer Build a 12-column multi-panel figure from this core claim and data, render panels, tile and label them, then run up to three QA revision rounds.

title.zh: 我要选择投稿目标并降低拒稿风险
title.en: I need to choose a submission target and reduce rejection risk

description.zh: 根据论文定位、期刊范围、贡献强度、参考文献结构和模拟审稿结果选择投稿路径。
description.en: Choose a submission path from manuscript positioning, journal scope, contribution strength, reference profile, and mock review.

prompt.zh: /journal-match 请根据摘要、关键词、参考文献和候选期刊，评估范围匹配、方法匹配、贡献匹配、审稿风险和投稿优先级。
prompt.en: /journal-match Evaluate scope, method, contribution fit, reviewer risk, and submission priority from the abstract, keywords, references, and candidate journals.

workflow.step: 针对目标期刊重塑摘要

prompt.zh: /abstract 根据首选期刊读者和栏目定位，调整摘要中的问题开场、贡献表达、关键词和预期读者。
prompt.en: /abstract Adjust the opening problem, contribution framing, keywords, and reader expectations for the top target journal.

workflow.step: 投稿前做一次压力测试

prompt.zh: /peer-review draft.md 针对首选期刊模拟审稿，列出编辑 desk reject 风险、审稿人可能挑战和必须先改的问题。
prompt.en: /peer-review draft.md Simulate review for the top journal and list desk-reject risks, likely reviewer challenges, and must-fix issues.

title.zh: 我要分析单细胞数据并形成可发表结果
title.en: I need to analyze single-cell data into publishable results

description.zh: 围绕 h5ad/表达矩阵进行批次校正、细胞嵌入、注释迁移、差异表达、基础模型分析和图表输出。
description.en: Work from h5ad or expression matrices through batch correction, embeddings, label transfer, DE, foundation-model analysis, and figures.

prompt.zh: /compute-env-setup 为单细胞分析搭建 GPU 环境，包含 scvi-tools、scanpy、torch、可复用缓存和结果目录约定。
prompt.en: /compute-env-setup Set up a GPU environment for single-cell analysis with scvi-tools, scanpy, torch, reusable caches, and output-directory conventions.

prompt.zh: /scvi-tools 使用 raw counts 训练 scVI/scANVI，生成低维表示、批次校正 UMAP、标签迁移结果和差异表达候选基因。
prompt.en: /scvi-tools Train scVI/scANVI from raw counts and produce latent embeddings, batch-corrected UMAPs, label transfer, and DE candidate genes.

prompt.zh: /scgpt 基于 AnnData 生成细胞嵌入和零样本注释，并对关键 cluster 的基因表示和扰动线索做解释。
prompt.en: /scgpt Generate cell embeddings and zero-shot annotations from AnnData, then interpret gene representations and perturbation clues for key clusters.

title.zh: 我要做蛋白结构预测、设计或 docking
title.en: I need protein structure prediction, design, or docking

description.zh: 从序列、PDB、SMILES 或设计骨架出发，完成结构预测、复合物共折叠、反向折叠、可溶性优化和小分子 docking。
description.en: Start from sequences, PDBs, SMILES, or design backbones to run structure prediction, co-folding, inverse folding, solubility optimization, and docking.

prompt.zh: /boltz 根据这些 FASTA、PDB 和配体信息判断应使用 Boltz、Chai-1、AlphaFold2 还是 OpenFold3，并先运行最适合的复合物预测。
prompt.en: /boltz From these FASTA, PDB, and ligand inputs, decide whether Boltz, Chai-1, AlphaFold2, or OpenFold3 fits best, then run the best complex prediction first.

prompt.zh: /proteinmpnn 对这些骨架进行序列设计；如果存在配体、金属或核酸上下文，请切换到 LigandMPNN；如果目标是表达量，请给出 SolubleMPNN 方案。
prompt.en: /proteinmpnn Design sequences for these backbones; switch to LigandMPNN when ligand, metal, or nucleic-acid context matters, and propose SolubleMPNN when expression is the goal.

prompt.zh: /diffdock 将这些 SMILES/SDF 小分子 dock 到候选蛋白结构，输出 ranked poses、置信度和需要重评分的候选。
prompt.en: /diffdock Dock these SMILES/SDF ligands against candidate protein structures and output ranked poses, confidence, and candidates for rescoring.

title.zh: 我要用基础模型做序列打分、嵌入或变异效应预测
title.en: I need foundation models for sequence scoring, embeddings, or variant effects

description.zh: 面向 DNA、蛋白和基因组功能轨道，调用 Evo 2、Borzoi、ESM-2 或自定义端点完成打分、嵌入和预测。
description.en: Use Evo 2, Borzoi, ESM-2, or custom endpoints for DNA, protein, and genomic-track scoring, embeddings, and prediction.

prompt.zh: /evo2 对这些基因组窗口计算序列似然、变异 delta 分数和嵌入，并为下游分类任务导出特征表。
prompt.en: /evo2 Compute sequence likelihoods, variant delta scores, and embeddings for these genomic windows, then export a feature table for downstream classification.

prompt.zh: /borzoi 对这些非编码变异生成表达、可及性和 ChIP track delta，按组织或细胞类型解释优先级。
prompt.en: /borzoi Generate expression, accessibility, and ChIP track deltas for these non-coding variants, then interpret priority by tissue or cell type.

prompt.zh: /fair-esm2 为这些蛋白序列提取 per-residue 和 per-sequence embeddings，并计算突变 masked-LM likelihood 分数。
prompt.en: /fair-esm2 Extract per-residue and per-sequence embeddings for these proteins and compute masked-LM likelihood scores for mutations.

title.zh: 我要把本地、集群或云 GPU 变成可复用科研工作台
title.en: I need reusable local, cluster, or cloud GPU workflows

description.zh: 把一次性跑代码升级为可复用环境、远程作业、模型端点、结果回收和成本可控的科研执行流。
description.en: Turn one-off runs into reusable environments, remote jobs, model endpoints, harvested outputs, and cost-aware execution flows.

targetUsers: 需要 GPU 的研究者

prompt.zh: /compute-env-setup 为这个项目建立可复用计算环境，记录硬件、依赖、权重缓存、测试命令和失败恢复方案。
prompt.en: /compute-env-setup Build a reusable compute environment for this project and record hardware, dependencies, weight caches, test commands, and recovery steps.

workflow.step: 提交远程作业并回收结果

prompt.zh: /remote-compute-ssh 将这个分析提交到我的 SSH/Slurm 主机，等待完成通知，回收输出，并整理 hpc/jobId 结果目录。
prompt.en: /remote-compute-ssh Submit this analysis to my SSH/Slurm host, wait for completion, harvest outputs, and organize the hpc/jobId result directory.

prompt.zh: /managed-model-endpoints 为这个模型注册本地或远程推理端点，再用 /using-model-endpoint 调用原生 HTTP API 跑一批预测样例。
prompt.en: /managed-model-endpoints Register a local or remote inference endpoint for this model, then use /using-model-endpoint to call its native HTTP API on a prediction batch.

title.zh: 我要把研究做成交互式展示、补充材料或教学工具
title.en: I need interactive research demos, supplements, or teaching tools

description.zh: 把复杂模型、数据结果、方法流程或抽象概念做成可分享的交互式网页、演示材料和视觉封面。
description.en: Turn models, results, methods, or abstract concepts into shareable interactive pages, demos, and visual covers.

prompt.zh: /learn 请把这个研究主题拆成适合非本领域读者理解的概念路径、互动问题和最小背景知识。
prompt.en: /learn Break this research topic into a concept path, interactive questions, and minimal prerequisites for non-specialist readers.

prompt.zh: /web-artifacts-builder 基于这些数据和讲解路径，构建一个单文件交互式科研展示，包含图表、状态切换和可分享说明。
prompt.en: /web-artifacts-builder Build a single-file interactive research artifact from these data and explanation path, with charts, state controls, and shareable notes.

prompt.zh: /algorithmic-art 为这个研究主题生成可调参数和随机种子的 p5.js 抽象视觉，用于展示封面或互动背景。
prompt.en: /algorithmic-art Create seeded, parameterized p5.js abstract visuals for this research theme as a demo cover or interactive background.

title.zh: 我要学习一个理论、方法或工具，而不是马上产出结果
title.en: I need to learn a theory, method, or tool before producing results

description.zh: 把陌生概念拆成可学习路径、先修知识、例题、测验和与当前项目相关的练习。
description.en: Break unfamiliar concepts into learning paths, prerequisites, examples, quizzes, and project-relevant exercises.

prompt.zh: /learn 我想学“这个概念/方法”，请按先修知识、核心直觉、常见误区、例题、练习和项目应用给我一条学习路径。
prompt.en: /learn I want to learn this concept or method. Give me a path with prerequisites, core intuition, common confusions, examples, exercises, and project applications.

workflow.step: 找出最值得读的原始材料

prompt.zh: /literature-review 为这条学习路径筛选入门论文、经典论文和最新综述，并说明每篇应该读什么部分。
prompt.en: /literature-review Select introductory papers, classics, and recent reviews for this learning path, and say which sections to read in each.

workflow.step: 精读材料中的关键段落

prompt.zh: /pdf-explore 在这些 PDF 中定位定义、算法、假设、实验设置和限制部分，并整理成学习笔记。
prompt.en: /pdf-explore Locate definitions, algorithms, assumptions, experimental settings, and limitations in these PDFs, then turn them into study notes.

title.zh: 我想把课题组重复流程沉淀成自己的科研 Agent
title.en: I want to turn repeated lab workflows into a custom research agent

description.zh: 当任务反复出现时，把提示词、判断标准、工具调用、评测样例和复盘日志沉淀为可复用技能或 agent profile。
description.en: When a workflow repeats, turn prompts, criteria, tool calls, eval cases, and audit logs into reusable skills or agent profiles.

targetUsers: 经常做重复科研任务的人

prompt.zh: /skill-creator 基于这个重复科研任务，起草一个新 skill，包含触发条件、输入输出、流程、失败模式和 5 个评测 prompt。
prompt.en: /skill-creator Draft a new skill for this repeated research task, including triggers, inputs, outputs, workflow, failure modes, and five eval prompts.

prompt.zh: /customize 为这个课题组流程创建 agent profile，绑定必要 skills、连接器和权限边界，并说明何时不应触发。
prompt.en: /customize Create an agent profile for this lab workflow, attach required skills, connectors, and permission boundaries, and state when it should not trigger.

prompt.zh: /self-awareness 查询最近相关会话的工具调用、生成文件和失败点，整理成下一轮 skill 优化清单。
prompt.en: /self-awareness Query recent related sessions for tool calls, generated files, and failure points, then summarize the next skill-improvement list.
